'''鈭歴-w-k''' ('''sawaka''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:yarn|yarn]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-w-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yarn|yarn]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歴-w-k
|-
! Lemma
| sawaka
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:sawakithi|sawakithi]] || [[word:sawakiji|sawakiji]] || [[word:sawakishi|sawakishi]] || [[word:sawaki|sawaki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:sawakuthuth|sawakuthuth]] || [[word:sawakujuj|sawakujuj]] || [[word:sawakushush|sawakushush]] || [[word:sawak|sawak]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:sawakuthu|sawakuthu]] || [[word:sawakuju|sawakuju]] || [[word:sawakushu|sawakushu]] || [[word:sawaku|sawaku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:sawakufuth|sawakufuth]] || [[word:sawakufuj|sawakufuj]] || [[word:sawakufush|sawakufush]] || [[word:sawakuf|sawakuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:sawakethe|sawakethe]] || [[word:sawakeje|sawakeje]] || [[word:sawakeshe|sawakeshe]] || [[word:sawake|sawake]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:sawakothoth|sawakothoth]] || [[word:sawakojoj|sawakojoj]] || [[word:sawakoshosh|sawakoshosh]] || [[word:sawak|sawak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:sawakotho|sawakotho]] || [[word:sawakojo|sawakojo]] || [[word:sawakosho|sawakosho]] || [[word:sawako|sawako]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:sawakofoth|sawakofoth]] || [[word:sawakofoj|sawakofoj]] || [[word:sawakofosh|sawakofosh]] || [[word:sawakof|sawakof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:sawak忙th忙|sawak忙th忙]] || [[word:sawak忙j忙|sawak忙j忙]] || [[word:sawak忙sh忙|sawak忙sh忙]] || [[word:sawak忙|sawak忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:sawakathath|sawakathath]] || [[word:sawakajaj|sawakajaj]] || [[word:sawakashash|sawakashash]] || [[word:sawak|sawak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:sawakatha|sawakatha]] || [[word:sawakaja|sawakaja]] || [[word:sawakasha|sawakasha]] || [[word:sawaka|sawaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:sawakafath|sawakafath]] || [[word:sawakafaj|sawakafaj]] || [[word:sawakafash|sawakafash]] || [[word:sawakaf|sawakaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:sawakasha|sawakasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gosawakasha|gosawakasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokisawakasha|gokisawakasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:sawakn眉sha|sawakn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gosawaknkn眉sha|gosawaknkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokisawakn眉sha|gokisawakn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:sawaksh毛sha|sawaksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosawaknksh毛sha|gosawaknksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisawaksh毛sha|gokisawaksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:sawakrosha|sawakrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosawaknkrosha|gosawaknkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisawakrosha|gokisawakrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:sawakmusha|sawakmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gosawaknkmusha|gosawaknkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisawakmusha|gokisawakmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:sawaksherasha|sawaksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gosawaknksherasha|gosawaknksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokisawaksherasha|gokisawaksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:sawakngasha|sawakngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gosawaknkngasha|gosawaknkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokisawakngasha|gokisawakngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:sawakyasha|sawakyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gosawaknkyasha|gosawaknkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokisawakyasha|gokisawakyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:sawakyamasha|sawakyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gosawaknkyamasha|gosawaknkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokisawakyamasha|gokisawakyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:sawakn眉sh毛sha|sawakn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosawaknkn眉sh毛sha|gosawaknkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisawakn眉sh毛sha|gokisawakn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sawakn眉rosha|sawakn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosawaknkn眉rosha|gosawaknkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisawakn眉rosha|gokisawakn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sawakn眉musha|sawakn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosawaknkn眉musha|gosawaknkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisawakn眉musha|gokisawakn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:sawaksh毛n眉sha|sawaksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosawaknksh毛n眉sha|gosawaknksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisawaksh毛n眉sha|gokisawaksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sawaksh毛rosha|sawaksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosawaknksh毛rosha|gosawaknksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisawaksh毛rosha|gokisawaksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sawaksh毛musha|sawaksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosawaknksh毛musha|gosawaknksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisawaksh毛musha|gokisawaksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:sawakron眉sha|sawakron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosawaknkron眉sha|gosawaknkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisawakron眉sha|gokisawakron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:sawakrosh毛sha|sawakrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosawaknkrosh毛sha|gosawaknkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisawakrosh毛sha|gokisawakrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sawakromusha|sawakromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosawaknkromusha|gosawaknkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisawakromusha|gokisawakromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:sawakmun眉sha|sawakmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosawaknkmun眉sha|gosawaknkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisawakmun眉sha|gokisawakmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:sawakmush毛sha|sawakmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosawaknkmush毛sha|gosawaknkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisawakmush毛sha|gokisawakmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sawakmurosha|sawakmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosawaknkmurosha|gosawaknkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisawakmurosha|gokisawakmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:sawak|sawak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:s忙w忙k|s忙w忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hosawak|hosawak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hos忙w忙k|hos忙w忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohosawak|hohosawak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohos忙w忙k|hohos忙w忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉sawak|n眉sawak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉s忙w忙k|n眉s忙w忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉sawak|n眉n眉sawak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉s忙w忙k|n眉n眉s忙w忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂sawak|n茂sawak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂s忙w忙k|n茂s忙w忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂sawak|n茂n茂sawak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂s忙w忙k|n茂n茂s忙w忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lusawak|lusawak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lus忙w忙k|lus忙w忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulusawak|lulusawak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulus忙w忙k|lulus忙w忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lisawak|lisawak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lis忙w忙k|lis忙w忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilisawak|lilisawak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilis忙w忙k|lilis忙w忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kosawak|kosawak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kos忙w忙k|kos忙w忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokosawak|kokosawak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokos忙w忙k|kokos忙w忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kesawak|kesawak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kes忙w忙k|kes忙w忙k]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekesawak|kekesawak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekes忙w忙k|kekes忙w忙k]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a27364f}}
